mapper.select: SELECT DATE(wl.date) AS date, SUM(wd.weight * wd.rep * wd.`set`) AS value FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id JOIN MEMBER m ON wl.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(wl.date) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT meal_date AS date, SUM(totcalorie) AS calorie FROM MEAL_LOG ml JOIN MEMBER m ON ml.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY meal_date ORDER BY meal_date ASC

SELECT il.record_date AS date, il.weight AS weight, il.muscle_mass AS muscle, il.body_fat AS fat FROM INBODY_LOG il JOIN MEMBER m ON il.member_id = m.id JOIN USER u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE u.email = #{email} AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY il.record_date ASC
